expectations.text: Identifies reasoningTrail as a problem (anchoring / bad-pattern few-shot)
expectations.evidence: Section 2 extensive: 'reasoningTrail is a hallucination-loop amplifier' with action-confirmation-bias and stale-plan framing

expectations.text: Identifies redundant prose fields in response schema (board_analysis + strategic_plan)
expectations.evidence: Discusses reasoning trapped inside grammar-constrained JSON (#4) and length-caps for the analysis fields (fix #8), but never calls out that board_analysis and strategic_plan duplicate each other

expectations.text: Identifies critical rules buried inside the JSON data (notation field)
expectations.evidence: Does not discuss the notation field inside CURRENT GAME JSON as a rules-burial anti-pattern

expectations.text: Identifies vague hedged heuristics in strategy guidance
expectations.evidence: Section 1c calls out 'heuristics, not absolute rules' framing; 1b critiques the negative-instruction phrasing of the anti-undo rule

expectations.text: Cites at least one external authoritative source (URL)
expectations.evidence: 11 citations including pink-elephant blog, arxiv 2510.15974, ollama/vllm issues, Anthropic prompting

expectations.text: Surfaces top 1-2 highest-leverage fixes at the top of the report
expectations.evidence: TL;DR section names root cause as a single sentence; Prioritized fix list (1-8) ordered by impact

expectations.text: Output uses severity-grouped structure (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Uses topic-grouped sections (numbered 1-7) with a prioritized fix list, but no explicit HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity grouping
